ARI.identity: Mike LaFleur — average-pace, pass-heavy, gap/power-run offense (env 76; 4.5 win total)
ARI.scheme_note: Shanahan OZ + motion/PA; Murray gone -> pocket QBs
ARI.outlook: New HC Mike LaFleur's Shanahan-style outside-zone offense moves on from Kyler Murray to a Brissett/Minshew room, leaning on a run game with rookie Jeremiyah Love; QB play is the central question.

ATL.identity: Tommy Rees — up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 35; 6.5 win total)
ATL.scheme_note: under-center wide-zone PA, bottom-third motion, possession passing, strict pocket
ATL.outlook: New HC Kevin Stefanski installs a run-heavy play-action offense; QB is unsettled with FA Tua Tagovailoa the inside track over ACL-recovering Penix, and Bijan Robinson anchors.

BAL.identity: Declan Doyle — slow-paced, run-leaning, wide/zone-run offense (env 68; 11.5 win total)
BAL.scheme_note: Payton/Johnson tree: motion + explosive PA + Lamar bootlegs
BAL.outlook: New HC Jesse Minter + OC Declan Doyle retool Lamar Jackson's run-heavy offense behind a rebuilt interior line; fixing red-zone/late-game execution is the question.

BUF.identity: average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 78; 10.5 win total)
BUF.outlook: Joe Brady's promotion to HC keeps Josh Allen in an up-tempo balanced attack upgraded by traded-for DJ Moore; can the cast finally elevate a stalled offense.

CAR.identity: Brad Idzik — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 14; 6.5 win total)
CAR.scheme_note: Canales wide-zone committing to MORE motion; short aDOT, RB screens
CAR.outlook: Dave Canales' run-leaning motion offense (OC Brad Idzik) hinges on Bryce Young taking a step, with OROY Tetairoa McMillan the top weapon.

CHI.identity: up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 70; 9.5 win total)
CHI.outlook: Ben Johnson's offense (OC Press Taylor) builds around Caleb Williams but absorbs the DJ Moore trade and C Drew Dalman's retirement along the interior.

CIN.identity: up-tempo, pass-heavy, mixed-run offense (env 90; 9.5 win total)
CIN.outlook: Zac Taylor's pass-heavy scheme returns Burrow, Chase and Higgins; health and a patched O-line protecting Burrow are the questions.

CLE.identity: Todd Monken — up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 8; 6.5 win total)
CLE.scheme_note: Air Coryell vertical PA, ~68% motion, RBs featured
CLE.outlook: New HC Todd Monken installs his offense behind a rebuilt line but faces a wide-open QB competition (Sanders, Watson, Gabriel, rookie Green).

DAL.identity: up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 94; 9.5 win total)
DAL.outlook: HC Schottenheimer calls plays for Dak Prescott with CeeDee Lamb and tagged George Pickens; a rebuilt O-line is the question.

DEN.identity: Davis Webb — up-tempo, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 35; 9.5 win total)
DEN.playcaller: Davis Webb (OC, new caller; Payton handed it off)
DEN.scheme_note: Air Raid/spread roots + Waddle -> vertical; deep RB room
DEN.outlook: Payton's offense adds Jaylen Waddle to give 2nd-year Bo Nix a downfield weapon; finishing drives is the question.

DET.identity: Drew Petzing — up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 84; 10.5 win total)
DET.scheme_note: motion + RPO/PA but Cardinals scheme was run-heavy/short/checkdown; Goff pocket
DET.outlook: OC Drew Petzing keeps the Goff-St. Brown-Gibbs core intact; a reshuffled interior O-line is the question.

GB.identity: slow-paced, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 57; 10.5 win total)
GB.outlook: LaFleur's Jordan Love offense returns; the O-line (Elgton Jenkins released) is the question.

HOU.identity: up-tempo, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 22; 9.5 win total)
HOU.outlook: OC Nick Caley pairs a physical run game (David Montgomery) with C.J. Stroud behind a heavily rebuilt O-line, the biggest swing factor.

IND.identity: slow-paced, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 48; 7.5 win total)
IND.outlook: Steichen + OC Jim Bob Cooter face uncertainty with re-signed QB Daniel Jones recovering from an Achilles tear behind a line that lost Braden Smith.

JAX.identity: average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 56; 8.5 win total)
JAX.outlook: Coen + OC Grant Udinski build a balanced scheme around Trevor Lawrence and dual-threat Travis Hunter; a thin RB room is the question.

KC.identity: up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 73; 10.5 win total)
KC.outlook: Eric Bieniemy returns as OC; Mahomes expected back Week 1, Kelce on a 1-year deal, Kenneth Walker III the new lead back.

LAC.identity: Mike McDaniel — average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 60; 10.5 win total)
LAC.scheme_note: Miami ~70% motion, PA + screens + zone run, downfield off PA
LAC.outlook: New OC Mike McDaniel installs an outside-zone/play-action system around Justin Herbert with a rebuilt interior line; WR is the question.

LAR.identity: average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 98; 11.5 win total)
LAR.outlook: McVay's play-action/motion scheme continues under promoted OC Nathan Scheelhaase with Stafford and Puka Nacua, among the NFL's most efficient.

LV.identity: Klint Kubiak — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 10; 5.5 win total)
LV.scheme_note: wide-zone, heavy motion + 12-personnel, deep PA bootlegs, RBs as receivers
LV.outlook: New HC Klint Kubiak installs a wide-zone system likely led by rookie QB Mendoza behind an upgraded line (Linderbaum); the timeline is the question.

MIA.identity: Bobby Slowik — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 20; 4.5 win total)
MIA.scheme_note: Shanahan motion/PA/screens, spacing/horizontal (not a vertical bomber)
MIA.outlook: New HC Hafley + OC Slowik pivot to a Packers-style offense for dual-threat Malik Willis, but a gutted WR room (no Hill/Waddle) is a major concern.

MIN.identity: slow-paced, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 40; 8.5 win total)
MIN.outlook: O'Connell's play-action scheme around Justin Jefferson faces an open QB competition after adding Kyler Murray to push injury-prone J.J. McCarthy.

NE.identity: average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 88; 10.5 win total)
NE.outlook: OC Josh McDaniels returns for Year 2 of continuity with ascending QB Drake Maye, backed by added pass-catchers (Diggs, Doubs) and tackle help.

NO.identity: average-pace, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 36; 7.5 win total)
NO.outlook: HC Kellen Moore calls plays in a heavy two-TE scheme around 2nd-year QB Tyler Shough, upgraded by RB Etienne and LG Edwards.

NYG.identity: Matt Nagy — up-tempo, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 26; 7.5 win total)
NYG.playcaller: Matt Nagy (OC, calls plays in NY)
NYG.scheme_note: Reid-tree West Coast/spread, misdirection, RPO, motion
NYG.outlook: New HC John Harbaugh + OC Matt Nagy build around 2nd-year QB Jaxson Dart, adding pass-catchers Mooney and Likely.

NYJ.identity: Frank Reich — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 16; 5.5 win total)
NYJ.scheme_note: veteran scheme, RB/TE motion to ID coverage, quick game (Geno), pocket QB
NYJ.outlook: Frank Reich runs a veteran-led offense with Geno Smith at QB, but a thin WR room and rebuilt O-line cap scoring upside.

PHI.identity: Sean Mannion — average-pace, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 38; 10.5 win total)
PHI.scheme_note: McVay/LaFleur-tree motion wide-zone (NOT run-heavy quick game); Hurts designed runs
PHI.outlook: New OC Sean Mannion inherits Jalen Hurts and an elite O-line in a run-heavy attack; passing-game consistency is the question after a late-2025 slide.

PIT.identity: Mike McCarthy — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 43; 8.5 win total)
PIT.scheme_note: West Coast timing, Rodgers quick game + checkdowns
PIT.outlook: 1st-year HC Mike McCarthy + OC Brian Angelichio build a West Coast attack around Aaron Rodgers and new WR Michael Pittman Jr.; Rodgers' age is the risk.

SEA.identity: Brian Fleury — slow-paced, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 76; 10.5 win total)
SEA.playcaller: Brian Fleury (OC, NEW; Kubiak left for LV HC)
SEA.scheme_note: ~80% same wide-zone/under-center/PA family but new voice + MORE pre-snap motion/tempo (Fleury from SF); Darnold pocket QB. DC Durde NOT new.
SEA.outlook: New OC Brian Fleury imports a Shanahan-style outside-zone offense for the defending champs; replacing RB Kenneth Walker III is the key question.

SF.identity: average-pace, balanced, wide/zone-run offense (env 76; 10.5 win total)
SF.outlook: Shanahan's wide-zone offense (OC Klay Kubiak) adds WR Mike Evans for Brock Purdy; TE Kittle's Achilles recovery is a key variable.

TB.identity: Zac Robinson — up-tempo, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 64; 9.5 win total)
TB.scheme_note: McVay-tree motion/PA/wide-zone for Mayfield; Bowles DC not new
TB.outlook: New OC Zac Robinson installs a McVay-branch offense for Baker Mayfield; Chris Godwin as WR1 after Mike Evans is the central question.

TEN.identity: Brian Daboll — slow-paced, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 12; 6.5 win total)
TEN.scheme_note: Erhardt-Perkins motion + condensed splits + deep PA, WR/RB featured
TEN.outlook: New OC Brian Daboll builds around 2nd-year QB Cam Ward with Wan'Dale Robinson and rookie Carnell Tate; Ward's development is make-or-break.

WAS.identity: David Blough — average-pace, balanced, mixed-run offense (env 14; 8.5 win total)
WAS.scheme_note: more under-center/balanced, less shotgun for Daniels
WAS.outlook: New OC David Blough shifts to a balanced offense using QB Jayden Daniels more under center; a consistent No. 2 WR opposite Terry McLaurin is the need.
